name: Seeed XIAO ESP32-S3
notes: Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32-S3: a 21 x 17.5 mm board on the ESP32-S3 (dual-core Xtensa LX7, 8 MB flash, 8 MB PSRAM). 11 GPIO pins broken out as D0-D10 on castellated pads, 7 per side.
Every XIAO shares the same footprint and D0-D10 silkscreen, but the D-pin to GPIO mapping differs per model - this is the S3 mapping. Do not reuse a C3 or C6 wiring diagram here.
The 'Sense' variant adds a camera + microphone daughterboard that consumes many extra GPIOs (not broken out on the header) - this pinout is the base board's 14 castellated pads.
GPIO3 (D2) is a strapping pin; leave it floating or high at reset. Native USB (GPIO19/20) is used by the USB-C port and is not on the header.
External antenna: keep the u.FL antenna attached. BAT+ / BAT- pads on the underside charge a 3.7 V LiPo.

3.label: D2
3.note: Silk D2 / A2. Strapping pin - avoid holding low at reset.
